sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: One of the last buffets on the Las Vegas Strip is closing soon
feed.summary: The MGM Grand Buffet on the Las Vegas Strip is scheduled to close on May 31, significantly reducing the number of remaining buffets on the Strip to about a half-dozen. This closure reflects a broader trend of declining buffet popularity, influenced by post-pandemic health concerns and a shift in dining preferences towards food halls, particularly among younger generations. This news follows another recent closure by MGM Resorts International, Le Cirque at Bellagio, indicating a strategic shift in their dining offerings.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries Inc (MHK) Stock Up 6.5% and Still Undervalued -- GF Score: 79/100
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries Inc (MHK) saw its shares rise by 6.5% to $108.83, currently appearing undervalued by 5.1% according to the GF Value™ of $114.66. Despite an elevated P/E ratio of 18.4x compared to its historical median, the company holds a strong GF Score™ of 79/100, driven by its financial strength and profitability. However, insiders have sold $2.3 million in shares recently, and the company's growth rank is middling at 4/10, suggesting potential risks for investors to consider.

feed.title: Texas Instruments (TXN) Announces Results of Annual Stockholders Meeting
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) recently held its annual stockholders meeting on April 16, 2026, where the Board of Directors was elected and various proposals were voted upon. The successful election of the board and stockholder engagement highlight the company's commitment to strong corporate governance and driving long-term value. This announcement underscores the confidence stockholders have in TI's leadership and strategic direction as it continues to innovate and expand.

feed.title: Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE:SPG) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: Short interest in Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) significantly increased by 31.2% in March, reaching over 7.1 million shares, indicating a short-interest ratio of 3.5 days. Despite this surge in short interest, the company's shares climbed to a 12-month high after beating quarterly earnings expectations with $3.49 EPS and a 13.2% year-over-year revenue increase. Simon Property Group also announced a quarterly dividend and a $2.0 billion share repurchase program, while institutional investors have adjusted their positions, and analysts have issued mixed ratings with an average target price of $200.14.

feed.title: Qualcomm Recommends Stockholders Reject Mini-Tender Offer by Tutanota LLC
feed.summary: Qualcomm has advised its stockholders to reject an unsolicited "mini-tender" offer from Tutanota LLC to purchase a small percentage of its common stock. Qualcomm states it has no association with Tutanota and highlights that the offer price is conditioned on Qualcomm's stock price exceeding the offer price, meaning stockholders could receive a below-market price. The company also points out that mini-tender offers avoid many SEC disclosure requirements, offering less investor protection.

feed.title: Lightning Round: Buy Vertex Pharmaceuticals
feed.summary: Jim Cramer, host of "Mad Money," recommends buying Vertex Pharmaceuticals. He also provided his views on Oddity Tech, ImmunityBio, Aehr Test Systems, and Copart. This lightning round segment highlights his quick takes on various stocks.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001829126-26-003564
feed.summary: This document details the EDGAR filing for a Form S-4 (Registration of securities, business combinations) with SEC Accession No. 0001829126-26-003564. The filing was made on April 16, 2026, and accepted on April 17, 2026, by Wintergreen Acquisition Corp. and KIKA Technology INC. It includes a comprehensive list of 68 associated documents, including exhibits and graphic files related to the S-4 filing.

feed.title: A Look at UDR Inc (UDR) After 3.0% Gain -- GF Value $41.71 vs Pr
feed.summary: UDR Inc (UDR) saw a 3.0% gain, closing at $35.28, which is 15.4% below its GF Value™ of $41.71, suggesting it is undervalued. The company holds a strong GF Score™ of 82/100, driven by high profitability and valuation ranks, despite a low financial strength score of 3/10. While its current P/E ratio is significantly lower than its historical median, the lack of recent insider transactions indicates a neutral sentiment from executives.

feed.title: Apple defeats bid for new Apple Watch import ban at US trade tribunal
feed.summary: A U.S. trade tribunal has ruled in favor of Apple, rejecting Masimo's attempt to reinstate an import ban on Apple Watches. The decision follows an ITC judge's preliminary ruling that Apple's redesigned watches do not infringe on Masimo's blood-oxygen reading technology patents. This ruling allows Apple to continue offering its health features while Masimo considers an appeal and pursues other legal avenues.

feed.title: Weave Communications, Inc. (NYSE:WEAV) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Weave Communications (NYSE:WEAV) saw a significant 14.7% decrease in short interest in March, totaling 3,596,051 shares as of March 31st, representing 5.6% of its float. The stock closed flat at $5.34 with a market capitalization of $419.99 million. Analysts currently have a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $10.00.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Trent Thad Sells 30,000 Shares of ON Semiconductor Corp (ON)
feed.summary: Trent Thad, EVP & CFO of ON Semiconductor Corp (ON), sold 30,000 shares of the company on April 16, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at ON Semiconductor over the past year, with no insider buys. The company's stock is currently trading at $80, indicating it is significantly overvalued according to its GF Value of $58.27.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) Sees Large Decline in Short Interest
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) experienced a significant 14.8% decrease in short interest during March, with total short interest amounting to 18,103,460 shares by March 31st. The company reported strong financial results, beating EPS consensus, and announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.26 per share. Analyst ratings predominantly recommend a "Buy" or "Strong Buy" for NEM, with an average price target of $133.38.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy Inc (FANG) Stock Down 3.4% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 76/100
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy Inc (FANG) saw its stock price drop by 3.4% to $180.27, yet GuruFocus assesses it as 11.3% overvalued, with a GF Value of $162.03. The company holds an Above Average GF Score of 76/100, driven by strong profitability, but faces concerns about its momentum and significant insider selling totaling $2711.6M over the last three months. Investors are advised to be cautious due to the overvaluation and insider selling trend.

feed.title: Albemarle chief accounting officer Donald J. LaBauve Jr. to retire in June
feed.summary: Albemarle Corporation announced that Donald J. LaBauve Jr., the company’s Chief Accounting Officer, will retire on June 1, 2026, after over 36 years of service. His retirement is not due to any dispute regarding accounting practices or financial reporting. The company, based in Charlotte, North Carolina, has also recently undergone significant financial restructuring actions and received differing analyst ratings.

feed.title: U.S. judge rejects Bayer's bid to block Johnson & Johnson prostate cancer drug claims
feed.summary: A federal judge in Manhattan rejected Bayer's request for an injunction against Johnson & Johnson regarding alleged false advertising for its prostate cancer drug, Erleada. Bayer claimed J&J's campaign caused irreparable harm and threatened trust in Bayer's own drug, Nubeqa. However, the judge found Bayer unlikely to succeed on the merits of its claims.

feed.title: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) Trading Up 2.1% - Here's Why
feed.summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) shares were up 2.1% on Friday, trading as high as $314, with increased volume ahead of its Q1 report. Key positive catalysts include increased military production requests from the Pentagon, accelerated T901 engine development, and bullish analyst sentiment regarding its large installed base and strong aftermarket demand. However, the company faces risks such as potential profit-taking before earnings, valuation concerns, cost pressures, and recent insider selling.

feed.title: A Look at Weyerhaeuser Co (WY) After 3.3% Gain -- GF Value $26.8
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Co (WY) shares rose by 3.3% to $25.17, trading below its GF Value™ of $26.87, indicating it is currently undervalued. The company holds a GF Score™ of 75/100, suggesting above-average potential for long-term returns, supported by insider buying activity. Despite a high current P/E ratio compared to its historical median, the valuation rank is strong, though growth prospects are noted as moderate.

feed.title: The Metals Company submits decade’s worth of deep-sea exploration data to ISA
feed.summary: The Metals Company (TMC) has submitted a decade's worth of deep-sea exploration data from its subsidiaries, Nauru Ocean Resources Inc. (NORI) and Tonga Offshore Mining Ltd. (TOML), to the International Seabed Authority's (ISA) DeepData database. This extensive data, collected from the Clarion-Clipperton Zone (CCZ) between 2013-2022, includes biological, geochemical, and imaging data which now represents roughly one-third of all CCZ data in DeepData. TMC asserts that this comprehensive dataset, backed by significant investment, addresses environmental concerns and supports the feasibility of monitored commercial deep-sea mining.

feed.title: Dow's 890-point rally led by gains in Sherwin-Williams Co., Home Depot shares
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced an 890-point rally, driven primarily by significant gains in the shares of Sherwin-Williams Co. and Home Depot. This strong performance indicates a positive day for these key companies and contributed substantially to the overall market increase.

feed.title: PATENT—Fed. Cir.: Validity of Teva Pharma’s migraine antibody patents reinstated, judgment for Eli Lilly reversed
feed.summary: The Federal Circuit has reinstated the validity of Teva Pharmaceutical's migraine antibody patents and reversed a judgment in favor of Eli Lilly. This decision significantly impacts the competitive landscape for migraine treatments, particularly those operating in the CGRP antibody space.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Shares Up 2.8% - Still a Buy?
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble's shares rose 2.8% to $147 after the company reaffirmed its shareholder-return plan, announcing its 70th consecutive dividend increase and plans to return approximately $15 billion in 2026 through dividends and buybacks. While analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $163, concerns remain about the stock's ~20x earnings valuation and recent insider selling, especially as the company warns against a low-priced mini-tender offer. Upcoming earnings are expected to show growth, but analysts suggest managing expectations for a potentially mixed report due to tariff and commodity cost pressures.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Shares Down 1.1% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) shares dropped 1.1% on Friday, trading at $64.21, following a decline in trading volume. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $1.06, but its high payout ratio raises concerns about sustainability. Analysts currently have a "Hold" rating on the stock with an average price target of $65.88, while the company's latest earnings missed estimates slightly.

feed.title: Taylor, Velocity financial executive VP, sells $42k in stock
feed.summary: Jeffrey T. Taylor, Executive Vice President at Velocity Financial, Inc. (NYSE:VEL), sold 2,130 shares of company stock for a total of $42,600 on April 17, 2026. This transaction occurred as VEL stock trades near $19.90, having risen 14% over the past year, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued. The company recently reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations.

feed.title: UMH PROPERTIES, INC. ($UMH) President and CEO 2024 Pay Revealed
feed.summary: UMH PROPERTIES, INC.'s President and CEO received an estimated compensation of $3,509,598 in 2024, based on a recent SEC filing. The article also details insider trading activity, institutional holdings changes, and recent analyst ratings and price targets for UMH stock.

feed.title: Why VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
feed.summary: VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) saw its stock rise by 2.15% in the latest session, outperforming major indices like the S&P 500, Dow, and Nasdaq. The company is set to announce its earnings on April 29, 2026, with analysts expecting a 5.17% EPS increase and 3.76% revenue growth year-over-year. VICI currently holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and favourable valuation metrics compared to its industry peers.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Receives FDA Clearance for Expanded Reverse Shoulder Systems
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. announced FDA 510(k) clearance for an expanded line of its Identity and Comprehensive Reverse Shoulder Systems. This expansion introduces smaller implant sizes, corresponding surgical tools, and a new Alliance Humeral Bearing with Vitamin E polyethylene. These additions aim to enable surgeons to treat a broader range of patient statures, simplify operating room procedures by using a single bearing across multiple systems, and offer greater surgical flexibility.

feed.title: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) accounting chief reports RSU vesting and tax share withholding
feed.summary: Apple Inc.'s Principal Accounting Officer, Ben Borders, reported the vesting of 1,717 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026. A portion of these shares (892) were withheld by Apple at $266.43 per share to cover tax obligations, with no shares sold on the open market. Following these transactions, Borders directly holds 39,987 shares of Apple common stock, reflecting a routine equity compensation event.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Inc (TOL) Stock Up 5.6% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 95/100
feed.summary: Toll Brothers Inc (TOL) shares rose 5.6% to $146.68 but are considered overvalued by 8.0% according to GF Value™, despite a strong GF Score™ of 95/100. Insider selling of $12.0M in the last three months suggests a lack of confidence among company executives. The stock's current P/E ratio of 10.5x is also 26% above its 5-year median, further indicating overvaluation and potential risks for investors.

feed.title: American rejects merger talks with United Airlines
feed.summary: American Airlines announced its disinterest in merging with United Airlines and confirmed no such talks have occurred, effectively ending speculation about a major industry consolidation. American stated that a merger would negatively impact competition and consumers and would likely face significant regulatory and public scrutiny. This rejection comes after United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly pitched the idea to U.S. President Donald Trump in February.

feed.title: A Look at Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc (MAA) After 3.9% Gain -- GF Value $149.79 vs Price $127.94
feed.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities Inc (MAA) shares increased by 3.9% to $127.94. While the stock is identified as "Modestly Undervalued" by GuruFocus' GF Value™ at $149.79, suggesting a potential buying opportunity, its current P/E ratio is above historical averages, and insider selling activity raises caution. MAA holds a GF Score™ of 76/100, indicating above-average long-term return potential, primarily due to its strong valuation rank, but shows lower financial strength and momentum scores.

feed.title: Copart (CPRT) CEO exercises 49,775 options, sells 26,213 shares under plan
feed.summary: Copart CEO Jeffrey Liaw exercised 49,775 stock options at strike prices of $6.78 and $8.70 per share and subsequently sold 26,213 shares of common stock at weighted average prices of about $33.18 and $33.17 per share. These sales were conducted automatically under a pre-scheduled Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on April 15, 2025. Following these transactions, Liaw retained direct ownership of 79,532 Copart shares.

feed.title: Millicom’s Tigo Paraguay to Fully Redeem $139.7 Million 2027 Notes on April 29
feed.summary: Millicom’s Paraguayan subsidiary, Tigo Paraguay, announced its plan to fully redeem $139.7 million of its 5.875% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2027 on April 29, 2026. This move demonstrates Millicom's active balance-sheet management and will accelerate the return of principal for bondholders. An AI analyst from TipRanks rates TIGO as "Outperform," citing strong projected profitability and attractive valuation, though noting leverage as a risk.

feed.title: NRG Energy Debt Moves Highlight Refinancing Plans And Valuation Upside Potential
feed.summary: NRG Energy has launched and priced over US$2.5 billion in new secured and unsecured notes, alongside a tender offer for its subsidiary Lightning Power's senior secured notes. This initiative represents NRG's first significant debt refinancing effort since its recent fleet expansion and acquisitions, aiming to reshape its capital structure. For investors, understanding how this package impacts NRG's interest costs, debt maturity profile, and future capital allocation is crucial, especially given that its interest payments are not currently well covered by earnings.

feed.title: Will Costco’s (COST) Dividend Hike Backed by Strong Sales Change Its Capital Allocation Narrative?
feed.summary: Costco (COST) recently announced a quarterly dividend increase, raising it from US$1.30 to US$1.47 per share, payable on May 15, 2026. This hike follows strong March net sales of US$28.41 billion and year-to-date sales of US$173.26 billion, reinforcing the effectiveness of Costco’s membership model for cash generation and shareholder returns. The company's investment narrative continues to hinge on converting warehouse traffic and renewal rates into reliable cash flow, with ongoing sales and membership growth as key catalysts despite potential margin pressures.

feed.title: Special Opportunities Fund, Inc. (NYSE:SPE) Short Interest Up 31.8% in March
feed.summary: Special Opportunities Fund, Inc. (NYSE:SPE) experienced a 31.8% increase in short interest during March, reaching 52,624 shares by March 31st. This represents approximately 0.5% of the company's stock, with a short-interest ratio of 1.1 days based on average trading volume. Institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings, and the fund recently declared a monthly dividend of $0.1087, implying a 9.1% annualized yield.

feed.title: American Airlines Says It’s Not Interested in United Merger
feed.summary: American Airlines has stated it is not interested in a merger with United Airlines, despite United's CEO, Scott Kirby, having discussed a possible combination with President Donald Trump. American Airlines believes such a tie-up would negatively impact both competition and consumers.

feed.title: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) director sells 580 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Meta Platforms director Robert M. Kimmitt sold 580 shares of Class A common stock at $667.00 per share on April 15, 2026, as reported in a Form 4 filing. This transaction, totaling $386,860, was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on August 15, 2025. Following the sale, Kimmitt directly holds 3,847 shares of Meta Platforms.

feed.title: General Dynamics (GD) Stock Falls Amid Market Uptick: What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) stock fell by 1.17% in the latest trading session, underperforming the broader market. The defense contractor's stock has dropped 4.1% in the past month, trailing its sector and the S&P 500. Investors are looking forward to its Q1 2026 earnings report, with analysts expecting a 1.37% EPS growth and a 4.18% revenue increase.

feed.title: SM Energy slides as crude oil plunges on Strait of Hormuz reopening
feed.summary: SM Energy (SM) shares dropped 7.3% following a significant decline in crude oil prices. This dip is attributed to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for commercial tankers, which caused U.S. and Brent crude to fall around 9%, making oil production less profitable. SM Energy's 2026 plan is heavily oil-weighted, and a recent analyst downgrade further amplified the stock's negative performance.

feed.title: Phillips 66 Announces Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (NYSE: PSX) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.27 per share on its common stock. This dividend is scheduled for payment on June 1, 2026, to shareholders who are of record as of the close of business on May 18, 2026. Phillips 66 is an integrated downstream energy provider based in Houston, TX, involved in various sectors including Midstream, Chemicals, Refining, Marketing, Specialties, and Renewable Fuels.

feed.title: Fortinet Investigation Initiated: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates the Officers and Directors of Fortinet Inc. - FTNT
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) has initiated an investigation into Fortinet Inc. (FTNT) regarding potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its officers and directors. This investigation follows the company's disappointing Q2 2025 financial results and subsequent securities class action lawsuit. KSF is seeking information from long-term shareholders who may have been affected.

feed.title: WW (WW) chief legal officer reports RSUs and stock holdings on Form 3
feed.summary: WW International's Chief Legal Officer, Debra Cotter, filed a Form 3 reporting her initial beneficial ownership in the company. The filing indicates she directly holds 1,109 shares of common stock and 6,666 restricted stock units (RSUs). These RSUs, granted on December 18, 2025, are set to vest in one-third increments on January 1, 2027, 2028, and 2029.

feed.title: WW International (WW) grants RSU and performance stock units to CLO
feed.summary: WW International (WW) Chief Legal Officer and Secretary Debra Cotter received grants of 2,666 Restricted Stock Units (RSU) and 1,200 Performance Stock Units (PSU) on April 15, 2026. These equity awards will vest in three equal installments on January 1, 2027, January 1, 2028, and January 1, 2029. The PSUs are subject to both continued employment through January 1, 2029, and the satisfaction of specific stock price performance conditions.

feed.title: XChange TEC.INC Sets Up Up to $100 Million ADS Equity Facility With VG Master Fund
feed.summary: XChange TEC.INC has established an optional $100 million ADS purchase facility with VG Master Fund SPC, offering flexible equity financing for working capital needs until April 1, 2028, or until the fund is fully utilized. The agreement allows XChange TEC.INC to control the timing and size of drawdowns, subject to conditions including minimum transaction amounts and an ownership cap for VG Master Fund. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates XHG as "Underperform" due to severe financial distress, declining revenue, negative cash flows, and a bearish technical trend.

feed.title: Hockey fans wearing NHL team's jersey to Chipotle can score free entree on Monday
feed.summary: Chipotle is bringing back its "Hockey Jersey BOGO" special for the first Monday of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, April 20. Fans wearing a hockey jersey to participating Chipotle locations in the U.S. or Canada after 3 p.m. local time will receive a buy-one-get-one-free entree deal. Additionally, 75 limited-edition hockey jerseys will be available through the Chipotle Rewards Exchange.

feed.title: Wellgistics Forms AI-Driven Pharmacy Access Joint Venture
feed.summary: Wellgistics Health Inc. has formed a joint venture called Healthstar with Kare PharmTech’s subsidiary Kare Rx Hub. Wellgistics will hold a 51% stake and acquire certain assets from Kare Hub for up to $2 million in stock. This collaboration integrates both companies' AI platforms to streamline prescription workflows, enhance direct-to-patient care, and aims to serve over 200,000 patient lives nationwide.

feed.title: WKC.N Stock News Today | Earnings, Events & Price Alerts
feed.summary: This article provides news and event updates for World Kinect Corporation (WKC.N), highlighting recent earnings calls, dividend declarations, and financial results. It details the company's Q1 2026 earnings call announcement, its Q4 2025 earnings where revenue was $9.029B and indicated a strategic transformation, and Q3 adjusted EPS results of 54 cents, undershooting estimates. The company's executives also commented on repositioning for long-term growth and strengthening its earnings base.

feed.title: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (TEVA) Shares Surge 3.6% -- What GF Score of 54 Tells Investors
feed.summary: Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd (TEVA) saw its shares surge by 3.6% to $32.40, marking a 137.4% increase over the past year. Despite this rise, GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is significantly overvalued at $32.40 compared to its intrinsic value of $19.37. The company holds an average GF Score™ of 54/100, with concerns highlighted by a poor growth rank and substantial insider selling totaling $57.2 million over the last three months, suggesting a lack of insider confidence.

feed.title: Southern Company: Hold Regardless Of Upcoming Earnings, Still A Core Utility Position
feed.summary: Southern Company (SO) is considered a core multi-utility holding, but its current valuation and macroeconomic uncertainties lead to a "Hold" rating despite aggressive capital plans. The company's $81 billion five-year capital expenditure aims to address demand growth and make grid improvements. While regulatory environments are supportive, dividend growth is expected to be modest due to a high payout ratio, likely just pacing with inflation rather than significantly outpacing earnings.

feed.title: PYPL Deadline: PYPL Investors with Losses in Excess of $100K Have Opportunity to Lead PayPal Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm is reminding PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) investors who incurred losses exceeding $100,000 between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, of the April 20, 2026 deadline to apply to be a lead plaintiff in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made misleading statements regarding its financial targets and growth potential for its Branded Checkout segment, despite the salesforce not being adequately equipped to execute on these goals. Investors can join the class action by contacting Rosen Law Firm.
